chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1595 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application --------------------------------------------- 30.01.2026 Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. SIP Rais AHmed of PS Azizabad ------------------------------------ During pendency of instant criminal bail application, report was called from District Prison & Correctional Facility, Malir, Karachi, perusal of the same reveals that applicant has been acquitted in FIR No.427/2025 of P.S. Azizabad. In view of such position, instant criminal bail application has become infructuous, which is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E Gusher/PS
